detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Dogella._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Dogella.sol#671-795):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Dogella.sol#735)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Dogella.sol#809-821)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Dogella.sol#741)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (Dogella.sol#829)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Dogella.sol#793)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Dogella.sol#955)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Dogella.sol#935)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Dogella.sol#937)
	Dogella._rOwned (Dogella.sol#347) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Dogella._takeTeam(uint256) (Dogella.sol#949-957)
	- Dogella._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Dogella.sol#909-945)
	- Dogella.balanceOf(address) (Dogella.sol#497-501)
	- Dogella.constructor() (Dogella.sol#431-461)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Dogella.sol#793)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Dogella.sol#963)
	Dogella._rTotal (Dogella.sol#359) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Dogella._getCurrentSupply() (Dogella.sol#1105-1115)
	- Dogella._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Dogella.sol#961-967)
	- Dogella.constructor() (Dogella.sol#431-461)
	- Dogella.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Dogella.sol#593-615)
detectors.markdown:

	- [Dogella.balanceOf(address)](Dogella.sol#L497-L501)
	- [Dogella.constructor()](Dogella.sol#L431-L461)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](Dogella.sol#L793)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](Dogella.sol#L963)
	[Dogella._rTotal](Dogella.sol#L359) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Dogella._getCurrentSupply()](Dogella.sol#L1105-L1115)
